title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
